title: My Tickets
subtitle: Track the issues you have reported.
empty: You haven't reported any issues yet.

report.title: Report an issue
report.description: Describe the problem and our team will follow up.
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain what happened and the steps to reproduce it.
report.attachmentsHint: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
report.attachmentsTypes: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF · up to 5 MB each

editDialog.title: Edit ticket
editDialog.description: Update the subject or description of your ticket.

deleteDialog.title: Delete ticket
deleteDialog.description: This removes “{title}” from your tickets. This cannot be undone.
